claims.summary: High-fill/high-entropy semantic persistence can stutter if the entropy multiplier overextends or fragments thoughts.
claims.rationale: Existing sensory_bus tests show high entropy extends semantic retention above low-entropy peers while remaining bounded by SEMANTIC_ENTROPY_PERSISTENCE_MAX_MULT and context caps.

claims.summary: The 0.25 recovery hold fill threshold could feel jerky near 0.24/0.26.
claims.rationale: Existing dynamic_semantic_stale_ms_for uses a 25%-40% smoothstep handover and tests semantic_stale_ms_smooths_thirty_percent_handover rather than a hard cliff.

claims.summary: A future stronger smoothing or dynamic decay change should remain bounded and authority-visible.
claims.rationale: The current implementation already uses bounded semantic_context_persistence_multiplier tests and marks authority as not sensor cadence or regulator change.
